sb_prompt: WHAT DO YOU CONSIDER THE MOST IMPORTANT BENEFITS BESIDES SALARY IN A JOB WITH A LARGE ORGANIZATION?  HOW SATISFIED ARE YOU WITH THE CURRENT BENEFITS OF YOUR JOB
turns: So, have you worked for a large organization before? If so, which benefits did you find most important besides salary?
Yes, I used to work for a big tech firm, and besides salary, I think health insurance and retirement plans were really valuable.
That makes sense. Do you currently have good health insurance and retirements plans through your current job?
Actually, my current job doesn't provide great health insurance, but the retirement plan is decent.
Yeah, that can be a bit of a tradeoff sometimes. What else do you wish was included in your job benefits package?
Honestly, I really miss having good mental health resources available at my previous job.
Oh, I totally get that. Good mental health support is so important these days.
Absolutely. It can make such a difference in our overall wellbeing.
Definitely. It seems like more employers should prioritize that kind of support.
Agreed. I hope more organizations start recognizing the importance of mental health resources for their employees.
Me too. It would make such a positive impact on people's lives.
Definitely. Well, it was nice chatting about this with you. Take care!
Same here, thanks for sharing your thoughts. Have a great day! Bye!
